metadata.description: QuantumAgent marketplace — three-layer quantum exploration architecture for Claude Code

plugins.name: cosmos
plugins.description: Three-layer architecture for quantum-inspired AI exploration: CLI (spawn/observe/crystallize), YAML DSL (declarative experiments), and Python primitives (psi/entangle/observe/measure/constraint as a pip-installable library). v3.1 adds Path B Phase 1: complex amplitudes, real quantum interference, Bell states. Multi-scale macro layer with project spin + singularities. Four entanglement modes including verifiable heartbeat protocol.
